title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.230 - Penalties, how recovered
text:
237.230.  Penalties, how recovered. — All penalties imposed by this chapter may be recovered before any court having jurisdiction, in the name of the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 15301) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14213; 1919 § 5547; 1909 § 6490
